headline: 3 Reasons BLDR is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Builders FirstSource’s stock price has taken a beating over the past six months, shedding 31.8% of its value and falling to $97.70 per share. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.
